meanings.definition: a thorough explanation (usually accompanied by a demonstration) of each step in a procedure or process
examples: she gave me a walk-through of my new duties

meanings.definition: a pedestrian passageway through the ground floor of a building
a first perfunctory rehearsal of a theatrical production in which actors read their lines from the script and move as directed
the act of walking in order to view something
examples: the realtor took her on a walk-through of the apartment
